description: B2B enterprise outbound: $50k+ ACV, 6-12 month sales cycles, account-based marketing

items.name: ABM (Account-Based Marketing)
items.tactic: 1 account = 1 team. Personalized at scale. Multi-touch: email + ads + call + LinkedIn. Higher conversion.

items.name: Committee selling
items.tactic: No single decision-maker. Build coalition. Align incentives. Use one champion to sway others.

items.name: Executive briefing
items.tactic: C-level doesn't want pitch. Wants: market insight, competitive threat, strategic opportunity. Lead with insight.
